objectives.title: Firestore Schema & Complete Seed Data
objectives.description: Complete Firestore collection schema with indexes and comprehensive seed data for all 11 countries and ~75 OpCos. Covers TASK-004, TASK-005, TASK-104. Currently: 18 collections in collections.py, seed.py creates partial data (15 OpCos instead of 75, missing legal_entities/customers collections). Audit needed: missing collections vs ARC-FINAL data model, missing indexes, incomplete seed.
assumptions: ARC-FINAL data model is authoritative for collection schema
75 OpCo records needed per project.md 1.2

objectives.title: Master Data Structures (without Warsaw)

objectives.title: Trigger Service & Scheduler Integration
objectives.description: Cloud Scheduler fires day-based triggers. Trigger Service resolves countries from DB, checks file-completion gate, acquires locks, initiates Buying Service. Covers SCHEDULER-CONFIGURATION-analysis.md.

key_results.description: Trigger Service checks file-completion gate (file_load_status) before initiating auto-buy for each country
key_results.check: Call trigger endpoint without file_load_status flag set, verify auto-buy not initiated

key_results.description: Country lock acquired before auto-buy, released after (Step 9), with TTL for crash recovery
key_results.check: Trigger auto-buy, verify lock acquired, verify lock released on completion and on failure

key_results.description: Trigger resolves countries from DB at runtime — no hardcoded country-to-day mapping in code
key_results.check: Change schedule in DB, fire trigger, verify new schedule used

assumptions: File-completion gate uses DB flag approach (D-024)
4 Cloud Scheduler jobs in Terraform (not app code)
